game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Die drei ??? – Ruf der Trolle:** Players navigate various locations in Rocky Beach by tapping on interactive hotspots to move, examine objects, and initiate dialogue with NPCs. The core gameplay loop involves collecting clues, combining inventory items, and solving narrative-driven logical puzzles, such as deciphering coded messages or reconstructing events from witness testimonies. Progression is linear, with the successful resolution of each puzzle or completion of a dialogue tree unlocking new scenes, character interactions, or advancing the overarching "troll" mystery storyline. Difficulty scales through the increasing complexity of multi-step puzzles and the subtlety of required deductions, while the user interface features a persistent inventory bar and contextual action icons for interactions. The game concludes upon solving the central mystery, with no explicit failure states beyond being stuck on a puzzle, and new locations become accessible only after specific story triggers are met.
game_info.description: Solve the mystery of the Troll's Call in Rocky Beach! As one of the Three Investigators, explore multiple locations, examine objects, collect clues, and interview witnesses. Combine inventory items and solve logical puzzles to uncover the truth behind mysterious troll-related incidents. Progress through the story by completing puzzles and unlocking new locations. The mystery is solved when you gather all clues and identify the culprit.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and UI elements
Space: Interact with hotspots, examine objects, advance dialogue
Z: Open/Close inventory
Shift: Combine selected inventory items
Enter: Start game from main menu
Esc: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart game (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic navigation and interaction mechanics. Verifies that the player can move between locations, interact with hotspots, and collect clues without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate to each accessible location, interact with all visible hotspots, and collect at least one clue. Test dialogue advancement and basic inventory management.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully visit multiple locations, collect items, and interact with NPCs. No crashes or errors during basic gameplay. Inventory correctly stores collected items.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the full gameplay loop from start to finish. Implements an optimal strategy to solve all puzzles and complete the mystery.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow the critical path: examine key objects in order, collect all necessary clues, combine items when needed, solve puzzles systematically, and interview all witnesses. Progress through locations as they unlock.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully solve all puzzles, unlock all locations, identify the culprit, and reach GAME_OVER_WIN state within a reasonable time frame.
